subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory! Thou art remembered in the presence of the Wronged One, and these verses have descended from the heaven of the Will of the Lord, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی ذکرت نزد مظلوم مذکور و این آیات از سماء مشیت حضرت قیوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @creation of the world
